autonomy.label: Team autonomy
autonomy.description: A global setting for this workspace — controls how far the agent team runs on its own before asking for your approval in the Inbox.
autonomy.lowDetail: Every important change goes through you. Agents propose and wait for your approval in the Inbox before applying. Maximum control, slower pace.
autonomy.mediumDetail: Agents review each other's work before finishing. You're only pinged in the Inbox for important decisions or when something fails. Recommended for everyday use.
autonomy.highDetail: The team runs everything to the end on its own, without stopping for Inbox review. Great for firing off a task and coming back to it done. Use when you trust the team.

empty.title: No agents
empty.description: Create specialist agents to delegate tasks (review, build, docs, etc).

newDialog.title: Add agent
newDialog.descriptionAskCeo: We recommend letting the CEO configure it — they know the team and adjust permissions.
newDialog.descriptionAdvanced: Advanced configuration — all adapter, model and policy parameters.

askCeo.missionHint: Describe what this agent does — the CEO will use it to configure it.
askCeo.missionPlaceholder: e.g. Reviews frontend PRs (React/TS), enforces design standards, suggests refactors...
askCeo.noCeoWarning: No CEO configured in this workspace. Use advanced configuration to create the first agent manually.

prompt.intro: Please create a new agent named "{name}".
prompt.instructions: Suggest the appropriate adapter, model, capabilities and system prompt. When ready, use the agent creation tool.

advanced.commandHint: Binary path or name (leave empty to use the adapter default).
advanced.cheapModelHint: Used when a run requests a cheap profile (summaries, etc). The primary model stays untouched.
advanced.enableChromeHint: Lets the agent open Chrome for web automation.
advanced.instructionsFileHint: Markdown file injected as initial context (e.g. AGENTS.md).
advanced.extraArgsHint: Extra arguments passed to the CLI on every run.
advanced.envVarsHint: Variables injected into the CLI process. PAPERCLIP_* are automatic.
advanced.heartbeatIntervalHint: Keeps the CLI process alive between turns (faster, more memory).
advanced.systemPromptPlaceholder: e.g. You are a frontend engineer specialized in React...

reportsTo.label: Reports to…
reportsTo.title: Sets who this agent reports to in the hierarchy

header.resetSessionsConfirm: Delete all sessions of this agent? This cannot be undone.
header.deleteConfirm: Delete agent "{name}"? All sessions, messages and runs will be permanently removed.

assignTask.placeholder: What does this agent need to do?

lastRuns.title: Latest runs
lastRuns.hint: Chat, code reviews and heartbeats — most recent first
lastRuns.emptyDescription: Send a message in chat, run a code review or fire a heartbeat to get started.

permissions.title: Permissions
permissions.hint: What this agent can do in the workspace

instructions.duplicateName: A file with this name already exists.

agentSkills.title: Agent skills
agentSkills.hint: Attached skills are injected as extra context in the agent's prompt.
agentSkills.emptyDescription: Attach a workspace skill below for it to appear in this agent's prompt.

available.title: Available in workspace
available.emptyDescription: Go to Skills (sidebar) to create the workspace's first skill.

skills.emptySkillsDesc: Create skills in Resources > Skills to use on this agent.
skills.emptyMcpsDesc: Install MCPs in Resources > MCPs to assign to this agent.

identity.title: Identity
identity.hint: Who this agent is and what it does
identity.name: Name
identity.title2Hint: How the agent presents itself — e.g. VP of Engineering
identity.capabilitiesHint: Free-form description of what the agent does
identity.capabilitiesPlaceholder: Reviews frontend PRs, enforces design standards…

adapter.title: Adapter
adapter.hint: Which model/CLI this agent uses to run

permsConfig.title: CLI Execution
permsConfig.hint: Parameters that control how the CLI runs on each invocation
permsConfig.autonomyHint: How far the team runs on its own before asking for approval. Applies to the whole workspace (set on the CEO).
permsConfig.autonomyHighHint: runs and finishes on its own, no inbox
permsConfig.thinkingEffortHint: How much reasoning the model should do before responding
permsConfig.bypassSandboxHint: Passes approvals/sandbox bypass (claude: --dangerously-skip-permissions, codex: --yolo). Use with care.
permsConfig.enableSearchHint: Enables the CLI's web search tool (if supported).
permsConfig.fastModeHint: Uses the CLI's fastest mode (lower latency, less context).
permsConfig.extraArgsHint: Extra args passed to the CLI. e.g. --verbose, --foo=bar
permsConfig.envVarsHint: KEY = name of the variable the process expects. Secret = value is encrypted and resolved at runtime.
permsConfig.timeoutHint: Maximum time of an invocation. 0 = no limit.
permsConfig.graceHint: How long to wait after SIGTERM before sending SIGKILL.

runPolicy.title: Run Policy
runPolicy.hint: When and how the agent runs automatically
runPolicy.heartbeatIntervalHint: When on, Orkestral runs the agent automatically per the interval below, using the HEARTBEAT.md prompt.
runPolicy.wakeOnDemandHint: Lets other agents wake this one on demand (callback).
runPolicy.cooldownHint: Minimum interval between runs of the same agent.
runPolicy.continueAfterMaxTurnHint: When the CLI hits the turn limit, automatically fires a continuation.

perms.title: Permissions
perms.hint: What this agent can do in the workspace
perms.createAgentsHint: This agent can hire other agents.
perms.assignTasksHint: Can delegate tasks to other agents.
perms.runCommandsHint: Can run shell commands (dangerous — use with care).

model.label: Model
model.error: Could not list models — using default

apiKeys.title: API Keys
apiKeys.hint: Tokens to authenticate external calls to this agent
apiKeys.tokenWarning: This value won't be shown again. Keep it somewhere safe.
apiKeys.revokeConfirm: Revoke key "{name}"? This cannot be undone.

issues.emptyActive: {name} has no open issues. The heartbeat will check again soon.
issues.emptyAll: {name} hasn't been assigned to any issue yet.

runs.title: Runs
runs.hint: Unified history: chat messages, code reviews and heartbeats
runs.emptyDescription: Send a message in chat, run a code review or fire a heartbeat — all of this agent's runs show up here.
runs.histHintOne: {n} run in history — chat, code reviews and heartbeats
runs.histHintOther: {n} runs in history — chat, code reviews and heartbeats

audit.title: Agent audit
audit.subtitle: Everything {name} did — grouped by issue.
audit.emptyHint: When this agent runs issues, every step (read, generate, tool, change, validate) shows up here.
audit.sectionHint: Everything the agent did, per issue — with the files it changed.
audit.noDiff: No diff in the working tree — changes may already be committed.
